title: lookup_sign data payload
description: Structured payload returned by the `lookup_sign` tool. Wrapped in the StructuredEnvelope from envelope.schema.json — refer to that schema for `schema`, `provenance`, and `warnings` fields. When `found=false`, optional fields are absent but `near_matches` may contain OGSL suggestions.

query.description: The raw input sign name as the caller passed it.

name.description: Canonicalized (upper-cased) sign name used to query upstream sources.

found.description: True if either OGSL (warm cache) or eBL /signs returned a record.

source_path.description: Which lookup path produced the result. `OGSL` = warm-cache hit (239 curated signs). `eBL` = fallback to /api/signs. `miss` = neither matched.

glyph.description: Rendered cuneiform glyph(s) as a JS string, formed from the unicode codepoint array. May span multiple codepoints for compound signs.

unicode.description: Unicode codepoints of the cuneiform glyph(s). Empty array when unknown.

list.description: Sign-list identifier (e.g. ABZ, MZL, LAK, HZL, KWU, OBZL, SLLHA).

number.description: Entry number within that list. String, since some lists use compound numbers (e.g. `ABZ406v2`).

cross_refs.description: Cross-references into the major published sign lists.

labasi.description: LaBaSi sign identifier when present (eBL exposes this as a separate top-level field).

sub_index.description: Akkadian/Sumerian sub-index for disambiguating homophonous readings (subscript number).

rendered.description: Display form with Unicode subscript digits already applied, e.g. `lugal₂`.

sound_values.description: Phonetic sound values for the sign. May be truncated; check `sound_values_total` and warnings.

sound_values_total.description: Total number of sound values upstream reported, before any truncation.

sound_values_truncated.description: True if `sound_values` was clipped at `max_values`. Caller can re-query with a larger cap.

logograms.description: Known logographic readings (top-5 by default; full list lives upstream).

logograms_total.description: Total number of logograms upstream reported.

near_matches.description: OGSL near-matches surfaced when both lookup paths miss. Substring-similarity, not Levenshtein.

ogsl_image.description: Reference image URL from OGSL's `image_1` field, when the OGSL path matched.
